requirement_topic.en: Electrical safety to NTE INEN / IEC 60335-2-24 and rating for the Ecuador 120/220 V 60 Hz grid
requirement_topic.zh: 依据NTE INEN/IEC 60335-2-24的电气安全及厄瓜多尔120/220V 60Hz电网额定
requirement_topic.zht: 依據NTE INEN/IEC 60335-2-24的電氣安全及厄瓜多爾120/220V 60Hz電網額定

summary.en: Refrigerators placed on the Ecuadorian market must demonstrate electrical safety to the applicable NTE INEN standard adopting the IEC 60335 series — specifically IEC 60335-1 (general requirements for household appliances) and IEC 60335-2-24 (particular requirements for refrigerating appliances, ice-cream appliances and ice-makers). Safety conformity is demonstrated through the Certificate of Conformity to the relevant RTE INEN, supported by test reports against these IEC-based standards. The appliance must be rated and safe for Ecuador's electricity supply: 120 V (single-phase, common household outlets) and 220 V, at 60 Hz. This differs from China's 220 V single-phase / 380 V three-phase grid at 50 Hz. The 60 Hz frequency affects compressor/motor selection and the 120 V option affects insulation, plug type (NEMA-style), and protective-device coordination. Spanish-language safety markings and ratings are required.
summary.zh: 投放厄瓜多尔市场的电冰箱须依据采用IEC 60335系列的适用NTE INEN标准证明电气安全——具体为IEC 60335-1（家用电器通用要求）及IEC 60335-2-24（制冷器具、冰淇淋机及制冰机的特殊要求）。安全符合性通过相关RTE INEN的合格证书证明，并以针对这些IEC标准的测试报告为支撑。器具须按厄瓜多尔供电额定并安全：120V（单相，常见家用插座）及220V，频率60Hz。这与中国220V单相/380V三相、50Hz电网不同。60Hz频率影响压缩机/电机选型，120V选项影响绝缘、插头型式（NEMA式）及保护装置配合。须有西班牙文安全标志及额定值。
summary.zht: 投放厄瓜多爾市場的電冰箱須依據採用IEC 60335系列的適用NTE INEN標準證明電氣安全——具體為IEC 60335-1（家用電器通用要求）及IEC 60335-2-24（製冷器具、冰淇淋機及製冰機的特殊要求）。安全符合性通過相關RTE INEN的合格證書證明，並以針對這些IEC標準的測試報告為支撐。器具須按厄瓜多爾供電額定並安全：120V（單相，常見家用插座）及220V，頻率60Hz。這與中國220V單相/380V三相、50Hz電網不同。60Hz頻率影響壓縮機/電機選型，120V選項影響絕緣、插頭型式（NEMA式）及保護裝置配合。須有西班牙文安全標誌及額定值。

standards_or_laws: NTE INEN adopting IEC 60335-1 — Household and similar electrical appliances — Safety — General requirements
NTE INEN adopting IEC 60335-2-24 — Particular requirements for refrigerating appliances, ice-cream appliances and ice-makers
RTE INEN (applicable household-appliance technical regulation) — mandatory route by which the safety standards are enforced
Ecuador grid: 120/220 V, 60 Hz (rating, plug type, and protective-device requirements differ from China 220/380 V, 50 Hz)

summary.en: China's mandatory safety standard for household refrigerators is GB 4706.1 (general requirements, modeled on IEC 60335-1) together with GB 4706.13 (particular requirements for refrigerating appliances, modeled on IEC 60335-2-24). Conformity is demonstrated through CCC type testing and the CCC mark. Although the GB 4706 series is technically aligned with the IEC 60335 series, the CCC certificate is a Chinese domestic approval and is not recognized by Ecuador. Chinese domestic models are rated for 220 V single-phase / 50 Hz; a Chinese-grid refrigerator is not, without redesign/re-rating, suitable or compliant for Ecuador's 120/220 V 60 Hz supply.
summary.zh: 中国家用电冰箱的强制性安全标准为GB 4706.1（通用要求，等效采用IEC 60335-1）及GB 4706.13（制冷器具特殊要求，等效采用IEC 60335-2-24）。符合性通过CCC型式试验及CCC标志证明。尽管GB 4706系列在技术上与IEC 60335系列对齐，CCC证书属中国国内批准，厄瓜多尔不予认可。中国国内型号按220V单相/50Hz额定；中国电网冰箱未经重新设计/重新额定，不适用且不符合厄瓜多尔120/220V 60Hz供电。
summary.zht: 中國家用電冰箱的強制性安全標準為GB 4706.1（通用要求，等效採用IEC 60335-1）及GB 4706.13（製冷器具特殊要求，等效採用IEC 60335-2-24）。符合性通過CCC型式試驗及CCC標誌證明。儘管GB 4706系列在技術上與IEC 60335系列對齊，CCC證書屬中國國內批准，厄瓜多爾不予認可。中國國內型號按220V單相/50Hz額定；中國電網冰箱未經重新設計/重新額定，不適用且不符合厄瓜多爾120/220V 60Hz供電。

standards_or_laws: GB 4706.1 — Household and similar electrical appliances — Safety — General requirements (mandatory; aligned with IEC 60335-1)
GB 4706.13 — Particular requirements for refrigerating appliances (mandatory; aligned with IEC 60335-2-24)
CCC (3C) certification — demonstrates GB 4706 safety conformity for the China domestic market

gap.en: Although both regimes derive from IEC 60335-1 and IEC 60335-2-24, the gap is in recognition and grid rating, not in the underlying technical standard. (1) Recognition: a Chinese CCC certificate to GB 4706.1/GB 4706.13 is not accepted in Ecuador; safety must be re-demonstrated through the RTE INEN Certificate of Conformity, typically supported by IEC 60335-based test reports acceptable to the certifying body (accredited foreign test data may be usable via the importer's certifier, but this must be confirmed). (2) Grid rating: the appliance must be rated and safe for 120/220 V at 60 Hz. A China-domestic 220 V / 50 Hz refrigerator may need a different compressor/motor, plug (NEMA-style), and protective coordination; 50 Hz-only rating is non-compliant. (3) Markings must be in Spanish. The technical convergence on IEC standards usually makes the safety re-demonstration cheaper than for non-IEC markets, but it is still a separate, mandatory certification — CCC carries no automatic credit.
gap.zh: 尽管两套制度均源自IEC 60335-1及IEC 60335-2-24，差距在于认可与电网额定，而非底层技术标准。（1）认可：依据GB 4706.1/GB 4706.13的中国CCC证书在厄瓜多尔不被接受；安全须通过RTE INEN合格证书重新证明，通常以认证机构可接受的IEC 60335测试报告为支撑（经认可的境外测试数据或可经进口商的认证方使用，但须确认）。（2）电网额定：器具须按120/220V、60Hz额定并安全。中国国内220V/50Hz冰箱可能需要不同的压缩机/电机、插头（NEMA式）及保护配合；仅50Hz额定不合规。（3）标志须为西班牙文。在IEC标准上的技术趋同通常使安全重新证明比非IEC市场更省成本，但仍是单独且强制的认证——CCC无自动抵免。
gap.zht: 儘管兩套制度均源自IEC 60335-1及IEC 60335-2-24，差距在於認可與電網額定，而非底層技術標準。（1）認可：依據GB 4706.1/GB 4706.13的中國CCC證書在厄瓜多爾不被接受；安全須通過RTE INEN合格證書重新證明，通常以認證機構可接受的IEC 60335測試報告為支撐（經認可的境外測試數據或可經進口商的認證方使用，但須確認）。（2）電網額定：器具須按120/220V、60Hz額定並安全。中國國內220V/50Hz冰箱可能需要不同的壓縮機/電機、插頭（NEMA式）及保護配合；僅50Hz額定不合規。（3）標誌須為西班牙文。在IEC標準上的技術趨同通常使安全重新證明比非IEC市場更省成本，但仍是單獨且強制的認證——CCC無自動抵免。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — electrical safety to NTE INEN / IEC 60335-1 & 60335-2-24 demonstrated via the RTE INEN Certificate of Conformity; appliance must be rated for 120/220 V, 60 Hz
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 4706.1 / GB 4706.13 safety compliance via CCC required before domestic sale in China (220 V, 50 Hz rating)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Ecuador adopts IEC 60335-1 / 60335-2-24 via NTE INEN, so the technical safety basis is close to China's GB 4706 series, but the Chinese CCC certificate is not recognized — safety must be re-demonstrated through the RTE INEN Certificate of Conformity, and the appliance must be re-rated for the 120/220 V 60 Hz grid with Spanish markings.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 厄瓜多尔通过NTE INEN采用IEC 60335-1/60335-2-24，故技术安全基础与中国GB 4706系列接近，但中国CCC证书不被认可——安全须通过RTE INEN合格证书重新证明，且器具须按120/220V 60Hz电网重新额定并附西班牙文标志。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 厄瓜多爾通過NTE INEN採用IEC 60335-1/60335-2-24，故技術安全基礎與中國GB 4706系列接近，但中國CCC證書不被認可——安全須通過RTE INEN合格證書重新證明，且器具須按120/220V 60Hz電網重新額定並附西班牙文標誌。
